title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NoBroker Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NoBroker Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker Global Group family as a Backend Developer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker Global Group:
NoBroker Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker Global Group!
